Modification_Detail.description: First PDS release of IUVS products
Second PDS release. This collection is only extended with new data -- no data from the previous version has been reprocessed

Third PDS release. Additional upper-level products have been added, and uncertainty has been modified in level 1C periapse. All products have been reprocessed with the new software, even if this would not change the data.

Fourth PDS release. Wavelength scale is improved in level 1B, and all upper-level products use this modified wavelength scale. Additional upper-level products have been added. All products have been reprocessed with the new software, even if this would not change the data.
Fifth PDS release. This collection is only extended with new data -- no data from the previous version has been reprocessed.
Sixth PDS release. A bug in dark subtraction has been fixed.
Seventh PDS release. Periapse retrieval is based on DN, rather than calibrated, images. MUV calibration curve shifted 7nm. Several pixel geometry fields have been modified.

Field_Binary.name: ID
Field_Binary.description: Name of emission feature

Table_Binary.description: name of the spieces (CO2, O2, and O3)

Field_Binary.name: ID
Field_Binary.description: Name of atomic/molecular species

Field_Binary.name: COLUMN
Field_Binary.description: Column density along line of sight

Field_Binary.name: COLUMN_UNC
Field_Binary.description: Column density along line of sight uncertainty

Field_Binary.name: DENSITY
Field_Binary.description: Density at the tangent point

Field_Binary.name: DENSITY_UNC
Field_Binary.description: Density at the tangent point uncertainty

Field_Binary.name: MODEL_RADIANCE
Field_Binary.description: Model fit outbound scan emission feature radiance

Field_Binary.name: MODEL_RADIANCE_UNC
Field_Binary.description: Model fit outbound scan radiance uncertainty

Field_Binary.name: RADIANCE
Field_Binary.description: Outbound scan emission feature radiance

Field_Binary.name: RADIANCE_UNC
Field_Binary.description: Outbound scan radiance uncertainty

Field_Binary.name: TANGENT_ALT
Field_Binary.description: Altitude of tangent point, or zero if line of sight hits ellipsoid

Field_Binary.name: TANGENT_LOS
Field_Binary.description: Distance from spacecraft to tangent or impact point

Field_Binary.name: TANGENT_LAT
Field_Binary.description: Geodetic Latitude of tangent or impact point of line of sight with Mars ellipsoid

Field_Binary.name: TANGENT_LON
Field_Binary.description: East Longitude of tangent or impact point of line of sight with Mars ellipsoid

Field_Binary.name: RA
Field_Binary.description: Right ascension of line of sight

Field_Binary.name: DEC
Field_Binary.description: Declination of line of sight

Field_Binary.name: V_TANGENT
Field_Binary.description: Position of tangent point, or NaNs if line of sight hits ellipsoid

Field_Binary.name: V_TANGENT_MSO
Field_Binary.description: Position of tangent point, or NaNs if line of sight hits ellipsoid

Field_Binary.name: VZ_INSTRUMENT
Field_Binary.description: Direction of instrument field of view Z axis, including scan mirror rotation. This is the instrument boresight.

Field_Binary.name: VZ_INSTRUMENT_MSO
Field_Binary.description: Direction of instrument field of view Z axis, including scan mirror rotation. This is the instrument boresight.

Field_Binary.name: VZ_INSTRUMENT_DOPPLER
Field_Binary.description: Doppler shift along the line of sight

Field_Binary.name: SPACECRAFT_ALT
Field_Binary.description: Altitude of spacecraft above reference Mars ellipsoid

Field_Binary.name: SUB_SPACECRAFT_LAT
Field_Binary.description: Geodetic Latitude of subspacecraft point

Field_Binary.name: SUB_SPACECRAFT_LON
Field_Binary.description: East Longitude of subspacecraft point

Field_Binary.name: V_SPACECRAFT
Field_Binary.description: Position of spacecraft relative to Mars center of mass

Field_Binary.name: V_SPACECRAFT_MSO
Field_Binary.description: Position of spacecraft relative to Mars center of mass

Field_Binary.name: SUB_SOLAR_LAT
Field_Binary.description: Geodetic Latitude of subsolar point

Field_Binary.name: SUB_SOLAR_LON
Field_Binary.description: East Longitude of subsolar point

Field_Binary.name: V_SUN
Field_Binary.description: Position of Sun relative to Mars center of mass

Field_Binary.name: V_SUN_MSO
Field_Binary.description: Position of Sun relative to Mars center of mass

Field_Binary.name: ET
Field_Binary.description: Time that the integration began (corrected for SCLK errors by SCLK kernel)

Field_Binary.name: UTC
Field_Binary.description: Time that the integration began (corrected for SCLK errors by SCLK kernel)

Field_Binary.name: COLUMN
Field_Binary.description: Column density along line of sight

Field_Binary.name: COLUMN_UNC
Field_Binary.description: Column density along line of sight uncertainty

Field_Binary.name: MODEL_RADIANCE
Field_Binary.description: Model fit inbound scan emission feature radiance

Field_Binary.name: MODEL_RADIANCE_UNC
Field_Binary.description: Model fit inbound scan radiance uncertainty

Field_Binary.name: RADIANCE
Field_Binary.description: Inbound scan emission feature radiance

Field_Binary.name: RADIANCE_UNC
Field_Binary.description: Inbound scan radiance uncertainty

Field_Binary.name: RA
Field_Binary.description: Right ascension of line of sight

Field_Binary.name: DEC
Field_Binary.description: Declination of line of sight

Field_Binary.name: VZ_INSTRUMENT
Field_Binary.description: Direction of instrument field of view Z axis, including scan mirror rotation. This is the instrument boresight.

Field_Binary.name: VZ_INSTRUMENT_MSO
Field_Binary.description: Direction of instrument field of view Z axis, including scan mirror rotation. This is the instrument boresight.

Field_Binary.name: VZ_INSTRUMENT_DOPPLER
Field_Binary.description: Doppler shift along the line of sight

Field_Binary.name: SPACECRAFT_ALT
Field_Binary.description: Altitude of spacecraft above reference Mars ellipsoid

Field_Binary.name: SUB_SPACECRAFT_LAT
Field_Binary.description: Geodetic Latitude of subspacecraft point

Field_Binary.name: SUB_SPACECRAFT_LON
Field_Binary.description: East Longitude of subspacecraft point

Field_Binary.name: V_SPACECRAFT
Field_Binary.description: Position of spacecraft relative to Mars center of mass

Field_Binary.name: V_SPACECRAFT_MSO
Field_Binary.description: Position of spacecraft relative to Mars center of mass

Field_Binary.name: SUB_SOLAR_LAT
Field_Binary.description: Geodetic Latitude of subsolar point

Field_Binary.name: SUB_SOLAR_LON
Field_Binary.description: East Longitude of subsolar point

Field_Binary.name: V_SUN
Field_Binary.description: Position of Sun relative to Mars center of mass

Field_Binary.name: V_SUN_MSO
Field_Binary.description: Position of Sun relative to Mars center of mass

Field_Binary.name: ET
Field_Binary.description: Time that the integration began (corrected for SCLK errors by SCLK kernel)

Field_Binary.name: UTC
Field_Binary.description: Time that the integration began (corrected for SCLK errors by SCLK kernel)

Field_Binary.name: COLUMN
Field_Binary.description: Column density along line of sight

Field_Binary.name: COLUMN_UNC
Field_Binary.description: Column density along line of sight uncertainty

Field_Binary.name: MODEL_RADIANCE
Field_Binary.description: Model fit inbound scan emission feature radiance

Field_Binary.name: MODEL_RADIANCE_UNC
Field_Binary.description: Model fit inbound scan radiance uncertainty

Field_Binary.name: RADIANCE
Field_Binary.description: Inbound scan emission feature radiance

Field_Binary.name: RADIANCE_UNC
Field_Binary.description: Inbound scan radiance uncertainty

Field_Binary.name: RA
Field_Binary.description: Right ascension of line of sight

Field_Binary.name: DEC
Field_Binary.description: Declination of line of sight

Field_Binary.name: VZ_INSTRUMENT
Field_Binary.description: Direction of instrument field of view Z axis, including scan mirror rotation. This is the instrument boresight.

Field_Binary.name: VZ_INSTRUMENT_MSO
Field_Binary.description: Direction of instrument field of view Z axis, including scan mirror rotation. This is the instrument boresight.

Field_Binary.name: VZ_INSTRUMENT_DOPPLER
Field_Binary.description: Doppler shift along the line of sight relative to solar system barycenter

Field_Binary.name: SPACECRAFT_ALT
Field_Binary.description: Altitude of spacecraft above reference Mars ellipsoid

Field_Binary.name: SUB_SPACECRAFT_LAT
Field_Binary.description: Geodetic Latitude of subspacecraft point

Field_Binary.name: SUB_SPACECRAFT_LON
Field_Binary.description: East Longitude of subspacecraft point

Field_Binary.name: V_SPACECRAFT
Field_Binary.description: Position of spacecraft relative to Mars center of mass

Field_Binary.name: V_SPACECRAFT_MSO
Field_Binary.description: Position of spacecraft relative to Mars center of mass

Field_Binary.name: SUB_SOLAR_LAT
Field_Binary.description: Geodetic Latitude of subsolar point

Field_Binary.name: SUB_SOLAR_LON
Field_Binary.description: East Longitude of subsolar point

Field_Binary.name: V_SUN
Field_Binary.description: Position of Sun relative to Mars center of mass

Field_Binary.name: V_SUN_MSO
Field_Binary.description: Position of Sun relative to Mars center of mass

Field_Binary.name: ET
Field_Binary.description: Time that the integration began (corrected for SCLK errors by SCLK kernel)

Field_Binary.name: UTC
Field_Binary.description: Time that the integration began (corrected for SCLK errors by SCLK kernel)

Field_Binary.name: EXOBASE_TEMP
Field_Binary.description: Model derived temperature at the exobase

Field_Binary.name: EXOBASE_DENSITY
Field_Binary.description: Model derived density at the exobase

Field_Binary.name: ESC_FLUX
Field_Binary.description: Model derived escape flux at the subsolar point

Field_Binary.name: GLOBAL_ESC_RATE
Field_Binary.description: Model derived global escape rate

Field_Binary.name: E_MEAN_500KM
Field_Binary.description: Model derived mean non-thermal O kinetic energy at 500 km

Field_Binary.name: DR_RATE_200KM
Field_Binary.description: Model derived O2+ dissociative recombination rate at 200km

Field_Binary.name: ESC_FLUX
Field_Binary.description: Model derived escape flux at the subsolar point

Field_Binary.name: GLOBAL_ESC_RATE
Field_Binary.description: Model derived global escape rate

Field_Binary.name: PRODUCT_ID
Field_Binary.description: Original filename of this product

Field_Binary.name: COLLECTION_ID
Field_Binary.description: PDS collection ID (currently unused)

Field_Binary.name: BUNDLE_ID
Field_Binary.description: PDS bundle ID (currently unused)

Field_Binary.name: CODE_SVN_REVISION
Field_Binary.description: SVN revision number of code used to produce this product

Field_Binary.name: ANC_SVN_REVISION
Field_Binary.description: SVN revision number of ancillary data used to produce this product

Field_Binary.name: PRODUCT_CREATION_DATE
Field_Binary.description: Product creation date

Field_Binary.name: OBSERVATION_TYPE
Field_Binary.description: Observation type string

Field_Binary.name: MISSION_PHASE
Field_Binary.description: Mission phase string

Field_Binary.name: TARGET_NAME
Field_Binary.description: Target name string

Field_Binary.name: ORBIT_SEGMENT
Field_Binary.description: Orbit segment (periapse, apoapse, corona etc, currently 0)

Field_Binary.name: ORBIT_NUMBER
Field_Binary.description: Orbit number (MOI is start of orbit 1, orbit number changes 30min before each periapse)

Field_Binary.name: SOLAR_LONGITUDE
Field_Binary.description: Solar longitude, 0deg=Martian spring equinox, 90deg=solstice, etc

Field_Binary.name: GRATING_SELECT
Field_Binary.description: Grating select (one of 'ECHELLE'/'LOWRES')

Field_Binary.name: KEYHOLE_SELECT
Field_Binary.description: Keyhole select (one of 'LARGE'/'SMALL'/'NEITHER')

Field_Binary.name: BIN_PATTERN_INDEX
Field_Binary.description: Name of linear or nonlinear binning table used for this observation.
